description_long: This is a rectangular, open wooden shelf unit with three equally sized cubby compartments along the top. The structure is made from light-colored wood panels, with a flat top surface and vertical dividers creating the cubbies. The sides are solid and extend down to the floor, providing stability and support. The back of the unit features partial vertical supports behind each cubby, leaving open spaces for visibility and airflow. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a storage or display shelf in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The finish appears smooth and matte, highlighting the natural wood grain.
description: A light wood open shelf unit with three cubby compartments and a smooth, matte finish. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open cubby compartments and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the thickness of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the partial vertical supports behind each cubby and open back spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and depth.
